quotes.text: You want loyalty? Buy a dog.
quotes.speaker: The Godfather (1972)
quotes.context: A Corleone enforcer dismissing a rival's appeal for mercy
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — it fits the clipped, world-weary cynicism of the Corleone inner circle perfectly. The subtle giveaway is that it's almost *too* aphoristic; the real film's sharpest lines tend to be a beat longer.

quotes.text: Every time I close my eyes I still see that runway.
quotes.speaker: Top Gun (1986)
quotes.context: Maverick speaking to Goose's wife after the accident
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — it matches the film's earnest, melodramatic emotional register and Maverick's survivor's guilt arc. The giveaway is 'runway' — the real emotional anchor in the film is the sky, not the ground.

quotes.speaker: The Big Lebowski (1998)
quotes.context: The Dude (Jeff Bridges) to The Stranger (Sam Elliott) at the bar near the film's end, summing up his laid-back philosophy.

quotes.text: The first rule of Fight Club is: you do not talk about Fight Club.
quotes.speaker: Fight Club (1999)
quotes.context: Tyler Durden (Brad Pitt) laying down the rules to the members of Fight Club.

quotes.text: Magic's just science that hasn't been written down yet.
quotes.speaker: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
quotes.context: Indy explaining the Ark's power to a skeptical colleague
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — it sounds exactly like Indy's classroom-voice bleeding into his field instincts. The giveaway is that Indy in the real film never quite reconciles science and the supernatural this neatly; his awe is left deliberately unresolved.

quotes.text: I never asked you to understand me. I asked you to trust me.
quotes.speaker: Casablanca (1942)
quotes.context: Rick speaking quietly to Ilsa during a tense confrontation
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — the cadence and world-worn romanticism are dead-on for Bogart's Rick Blaine. The giveaway is that Rick in the real film leans more on bitter wit than direct emotional appeals like this.
